info.title: Stash Managed Catalog API
info.description:
Read-only API for querying the Stash managed product catalog. Designed for server-to-server communication between partner backends and Stash services.

## Base URLs

| Environment | Base URL |
|---|---|
| **Test** | `https://test-api.stash.gg` |
| **Production** | `https://api.stash.gg` |

All endpoint paths below are relative to the base URL. For example, to list products in the test environment:

```
GET https://test-api.stash.gg/sdk/server/catalogue/products
```

## Authentication

All requests must include your API key in the `X-Stash-Api-Key` header. The shop is inferred from the key — no shop ID is required in the path.

### Setup

1. Go to **Stash Studio > Project Settings > API Secrets**
2. Click **Generate Secret** to create a new key
3. Use the generated key as the value for the `X-Stash-Api-Key` header on every request
4. Store the key securely — treat it like a password

### Example (curl)

```bash
curl -H "X-Stash-Api-Key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  "https://test-api.stash.gg/sdk/server/catalogue/products"
```

tags.name: Managed Catalog
tags.description: Read-only endpoints for querying the managed product catalog

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of published products with active offers for the shop associated with the API key. Results are ordered by creation date (most recent first). Only published products whose offer window contains the current time are returned; drafts, deleted products, and offers outside their schedule are excluded.

defaultText.description: Default text content, usually in English

productId.description: Partner-defined product identifier (e.g., SKU). Unique within the shop.

defaultText.description: Default text content, usually in English

description.description: Product description. Always non-empty for published products
description.title: Localizable Text

mainImage.description: Primary product image URL. Always non-empty for published products

status.description: Product status. Always PRODUCT_STATUS_PUBLISHED for this API

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created (RFC 3339)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated (RFC 3339)

defaultText.description: Default text content, usually in English

displayName.description: Human-readable display name. Always non-empty for published products
displayName.title: Localizable Text

cents.description: Integer minor units scaled per CLDR for this ISO 4217 currency (e.g., 499 for $4.99 in USD)

decimalPlaces.description: CLDR fraction-digit count for this ISO 4217 currency

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this price was last updated (RFC 3339)

items.description: A price entry for a product
items.title: Price

prices.description: Array of price entries. At least one entry (USD/UNIVERSAL/US) is guaranteed for paid products. Free gift products have an empty array.

image.description: URL to the item image. Always non-empty for published products

quantity.description: In-game item quantity as string for big integer support (no decimals allowed). Always > 0 for published products

defaultText.description: Default text content, usually in English

displayName.description: Optional display name for the item (max 50 characters)
displayName.title: Localizable Text

items.description: An item contained in a product
items.title: Item

items.description: Items contained in this product. May be empty if no items configured.

offerStartTime.description: UTC timestamp when the offer becomes available. Omitted if no start time is configured.

offerEndTime.description: UTC timestamp when the offer expires. Omitted if no end time is configured.

items.description: A published product from the managed catalogue
items.title: Product

nextOffset.description: Offset for the next page. Omitted if there are no more results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results per page. Defaults to 50. Maximum allowed value is 100.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset. Use next_offset from the previous response to fetch the next page. Defaults to 0.

get.description: Retrieves a single published product with an active offer by its partner-defined product ID (e.g., SKU) for the shop associated with the API key. Returns NOT_FOUND if the product does not exist, is not published, or its offer is outside the current schedule.

apiKey.description: API key authentication for server-side SDK operations. Pass your Stash Studio API secret in the X-Stash-Api-Key header.
